extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports Against the Company: 1 criminal, 24 tax, Nil statutory/regulatory and ₹69.37 million; Against the Directors: 1 criminal; and Against Promoters: 1 criminal. I counted all against-entity rows for criminal proceedings (3 total), counted statutory/regulatory enforcement separately (0), counted tax proceedings only for the company/subsidiaries (24), and excluded every By row; the quantified aggregate against the company/group is the Company row’s ₹69.37 million, or ₹6.937 crore. Contingent liabilities are disclosed as of September 30, 2023 in ₹ million, with no stated Total row, so the two disclosed items were summed: ₹18.74 million excise/GST demands plus ₹17.34 million income-tax demands = ₹36.08 million = ₹3.608 crore. The company-wide concentration figures are for Fiscal 2023, using consolidated revenue from operations as denominator: top five customers 47.28% and top ten customers 70.08%; source monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
